subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Ibn-i-Dhi'b (Epistle to the Son of the Wolf)
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, the Eternal that perisheth not, the Everlasting that declineth not, the Self-Subsisting that altereth not.... O God, my God! Attire mine head with the crown of justice... Thou seest me, O my Lord, with my face turned towards the heaven
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الباقی بلا فناء و الدائم بلا زوال و القائم بلا انتقال المهیمن
